diagrams.title: FCFS Scheduling Gantt Chart
diagrams.description: Shows sequential execution of processes in First Come First Serve order
elements: Process blocks showing P1, P2, P3, P4 in sequence
Burst times displayed in each block
Completion time marked for each process
diagrams.purpose: Understand FCFS execution flow and calculate waiting/turnaround times

diagrams.title: Round Robin Execution Timeline
diagrams.description: Circular queue execution with fixed time quantum
elements: Time quantum lines dividing process blocks
Ready queue state at each context switch
diagrams.purpose: Visualize Round Robin's preemptive nature and fair time allocation

diagrams.title: SJF vs FCFS Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side Gantt charts comparing execution orders
elements: SJF: ordered by shortest burst time
Waiting time bars for each process
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrate SJF's efficiency over FCFS in minimizing waiting time

diagrams.title: Multilevel Feedback Queue Structure
diagrams.description: Hierarchical queue system with process movement
elements: Arrows showing process movement between queues
Time quantum values for each queue
diagrams.purpose: Understand dynamic priority adjustment and prevention of starvation
